positive: A stylized, symmetrical forest landscape rendered in a modern folk-art, woodcut print style. The composition features two massive, stylized oak trees with deeply textured, gnarly silhouettes framing the central scene. Below the trees, a winding, magical river flows through overgrown meadows dotted with fantastical, glowing bioluminescent flora (ferns, mushrooms, and wildflowers). The color palette is deep jewel tones (emerald green, sapphire blue, amethyst purple) contrasted against warm earth tones (ochre, burnt sienna). Lighting should suggest twilight, casting dramatic, stylized shadows and enhancing the high contrast of the foliage. The overall aesthetic must be clean, graphically strong, and suitable for repeating textile patterns or large central placement on apparel.
negative: blur, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, signature, poorly drawn, ugly, bad anatomy, noise, low resolution, low detail, extra limbs, cropped, amateur, graffiti
